Module overrungl.stb
Package overrungl.stb

Class STBRPNode

java.lang.Object
overrun.marshal.struct.Struct
overrungl.stb.STBRPNode
All Implemented Interfaces:
overrun.marshal.Addressable
public final class STBRPNode extends overrun.marshal.struct.Struct
the details of the following structures don't matter to you, but they must be visible so you can handle the memory allocations for them
Since:
0.1.0
Author:
squid233
